IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: One Summit's mission is to help childhood cancer patients build courage, self-confidence, and resilience through experiential learning and mentorship with a U.S. Navy Seal. Our experiential learning takes place in the form of indoor rock climbing, at a Climb for Courage. Through this exciting, challenging, and safe adventure, we induce individual challenges that empower the children to achieve growth through conquering adversity. The long-lasting navy seal mentors inspire the hope and resilience these little warriors need to continue their fight against cancer.
IRS990.MissionDesc: One Summit's mission is to help childhood cancer patients build courage, self-confidence, and resilience through experiential learning and mentorship with a U.S. Navy Seal. Our experiential learning takes place in the form of indoor rock climbing, at a Climb for Courage. Through this exciting, challenging, and safe adventure, we induce individual challenges that empower the children to achieve growth through conquering adversity. The long-lasting navy seal mentors inspire the hope and resilience these little warriors need to continue their fight against cancer.
IRS990.Desc: Organizes events for the childhood cancer patients and help them to build courage, self-confidence, and resilience through experiential learning and mentorship with a U.S. Navy Seal.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 2: Description of Business or Family Relationship of Officers, Directors, Et
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Adam LaReau is the founder of the Organization. Joseph LaReau is his father. Matthew Fedor is his brother-in-law.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 11b: Form 990 Review Process
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A full copy of Form 990 is provided to all board members for review prior filing to the IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 12c: Explanation of Monitoring and Enforcement of Conflicts
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Monitoring and enforcement of compliance with conflicts is reviewed annually by the Board of Directors.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 15a: Compensation Review & Approval Process - CEO, Top Management
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The executive director's compensation is based on industry standards and approval by the Board of Directors.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 19: Other Organization Documents Publicly Available
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The Organization's governing documents and financial statements are made available to the public upon request.
